[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../../index.md) / [service/coffee/errors](../index.md) / CoffeeNotFoundError

# CoffeeNotFoundError

> **Service Layer**

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/errors.ts:40](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/errors.ts#L40)

Error raised when a requested coffee drink cannot be found by name.

## Remarks

Extends [Data.TaggedError](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) with the discriminant
`_tag = "CoffeeNotFoundError"`.  The `coffeeName` field carries the
lookup key that failed, enabling callers to include it in user-facing
error messages.

The field is named `coffeeName` (not `name`) to avoid shadowing the
inherited `Error.name` property.

## Example

```ts
import { Effect } from "effect";
import { CoffeeNotFoundError } from "./errors.js";

const program = Effect.fail(
  new CoffeeNotFoundError({ coffeeName: "Mocha" }),
).pipe(
  Effect.catchTag("CoffeeNotFoundError", (e) =>
    Effect.succeed(`Not found: ${e.coffeeName}`),
  ),
);
```

## Extends

- [`YieldableError`](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)<`this`> & {
  `_tag`: `"CoffeeNotFoundError"`;
  } & [`Readonly`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<{
  `coffeeName`: `string`;
  }>
